title: rubus perlongus
intro: Rubus perlongus, also known as the long bramble or blackberry bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus perlongus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to help manage diabetes and certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Rubus perlongus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made from its leaves, stems, and roots.
